title: Intense Horror
description: The ultimate mashup of horror mods and my overall growth in my modding abilities.
body:
Includes some of the classic horror beings such as slenderman, bigfoot, herobrine. But also has sprinkles of some new taste; with a completly custom world gen that feels like old beta minecraft, with some new additions and a bit of non-familiarity, which all contribute to the overall horror aspects of this modpack.

CAUTION: VR MODE CAN BE **VERY** LAGGY WITH SHADERS, RECOMMENDED TO TURN OF SHADERS **BEFORE** USE!
